source_quotes.exposure: The environmental exposure condition for the foundation system is classified as Severe.
source_quotes.water_ph: the potential hydrogen (pH) value of the water sample shall be monitored routinely and must be strictly not less than 6.0.
source_quotes.concrete_type: TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS FOR PLAIN AND REINFORCED CONCRETE STRUCTURES
source_quotes.specified_grade: The concrete deployed across all structural isolated footings shall be a design-mix designated under structural grade M30
source_quotes.cement_type: The cement used for all structural RCC members shall be Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC), 43 Grade conforming to IS 8112, or 53 Grade conforming to IS 12269
source_quotes.specified_characteristic_strength: The formal characteristic cube compressive strength (fck) of this M30 design mix at 28 days of standard curing is specified to be exactly 30 N/mm²
source_quotes.specified_sigma: fmean ≥ fck + 0.825 × σ (or fck + 3 N/mm², whichever is greater)
source_quotes.mixing_time_minutes: The mixing duration shall be maintained for a minimum period of 2.0 minutes
source_quotes.transport_time_minutes: The total time elapsed between the initial introduction of mixing water to the cement and the final consolidation within the formwork shuttering shall be kept as low as possible and shall not exceed 30 minutes
source_quotes.compaction_method: Thorough compaction of the concrete matrix is required to eliminate air pockets and achieve maximum density. All isolated footing concrete pours shall be compacted utilizing heavy-duty mechanical needle vibrators
source_quotes.curing_days: The minimum duration for uninterrupted hydration curing shall be maintained for a minimum period of 10 days
source_quotes.max_aggregate_size_mm: Nominal Size of Coarse Aggregate 20 mm
source_quotes.sampling_cube_size_mm: The cube specimens utilized for laboratory crushing tests must possess internal dimensions of exactly 150 mm × 150 mm × 150 mm
source_quotes.member_covers: the nominal concrete cover provided to all main reinforcement bars (including longitudinal tensile bars) embedded within the isolated foundation footings shall be strictly specified as 50 mm
